assertions.assertion: Program.cs calls AddStackExchangeRedisCache with the Redis connection string from configuration
assertions.rationale: AddStackExchangeRedisCache is a standard ASP.NET Core distributed caching pattern.

assertions.assertion: ICache<> is replaced with a distributed cache implementation (e.g. DistributedCache<> or equivalent) via AddSingleton or similar registration
assertions.rationale: The specific ICache<T> replacement with distributed cache in Duende context is not widely known.

assertions.assertion: AddConfigurationStoreCache() is called after the configuration store registration
assertions.rationale: AddConfigurationStoreCache() is known as the caching mechanism.

assertions.assertion: ClientStoreExpiration is set to 10 minutes via IdentityServerOptions.Caching
assertions.rationale: ClientStoreExpiration under Caching options is reasonably discoverable.

assertions.assertion: ResourceStoreExpiration is set to 10 minutes via IdentityServerOptions.Caching
assertions.rationale: ResourceStoreExpiration is less commonly known without consulting docs.
